page_title: Type 14 Mobile Command Post (EVA Command Cars)
text:
is a vehicle that appears in Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone.

Features

History

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone

Development

It was designed by the mechanical designer , Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone - Complete Records Visual Story Edition - Setting Material Edition p.275 more detail would be added in the final film. Yanase Takayuki Mechanic Design Works - Mechanical Design Works p.150
